title: [FIXED] Appsupport@monday.com temporarily down -- please email support@monday.com instead

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I hope all is well. Wanted to jump on here with a quick update.

At this time, our appsupport@monday.com email is experiencing some technical issues. However, our team is working to resolve them in just a few days. We will let you know once it’s up and running again.

For now, please send all your requests to support@monday.com, and they will be directed to our Developer Success team accordingly.

Additionally, our other channels of communication remain open (i.e. posting on the community in the relevant FAQ sections).

Thank you all for your patience and understanding!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our appsupport@monday.com email is back up!

Email away!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
